ddls:
CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "branch_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the branch */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the branch */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the branch */,
  "branch_head" INTEGER /* ID of the branch head */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the branch was established */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch the position belongs to */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "bps_level" INTEGER /* BPS (Basic Pay Scale) level of the position */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the position information was last updated */,
  "parent_position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent position */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the branch */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Detailed responsibilities of the position */,
  "required_qualifications" TEXT /* Qualifications required for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_parent_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the staff member */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the staff member joined the organization */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position the staff member holds */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the staff member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the staff member */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the staff member */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance with organizational policies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_lists" (
  "list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff list */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position the staff list belongs to */,
  "list_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff list */,
  "list_description" TEXT /* Description of the staff list */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the staff list was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the staff list was last updated */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the staff list belongs to */,
  "num_staff" INTEGER /* Number of staff members in the list */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_lists_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_lists_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_positions" (
  "staff_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff position record */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position the staff member holds */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member started the position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member ended the position */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the staff position (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "performance_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last performance review */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Status of required training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_positions_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_positions_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "position_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position update */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position that was updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the position was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who performed the update */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the position belongs to */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_position_updates_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_position_updates_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_position_updates_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, manager, staff) */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object detailing specific permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update, delete) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., position, staff) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., staff distribution, role hierarchy) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the report pertains to */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)
